message.content: The screen displays a modal popup titled "Upgrade your workspace for unlimited value" with a clean, white background. At the top, a toggle (green, enabled) highlights an annual plan saving €60/user/year. Two pricing cards are side-by-side: **Team** (€30/month, €35/month crossed out, billed annually) with a "Select team" button, and **Enterprise** (custom pricing) with a "Schedule a meeting" button. Each card lists features (checkmarks, e.g., unlimited docs, LLM models, priority support). A close (×) button is top-right. The background is grayed-out, showing a sidebar (folders, settings) and top nav (Invite, Help). Colors: white modal, dark gray buttons, green toggle, black text. Interactions: toggle, button clicks, close modal. Footer notes security compliance.
